name: astral
description: Repo-local Codex adapter for Astral's official Python tool skills.

interface.shortDescription: Use Astral's uv, ruff, and ty guidance in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Repo-local Codex adapter for Astral's official Claude Code skills for uv, ruff, and ty. The skill text is copied from astral-sh/claude-code-plugins so this repo can expose equivalent Python tooling guidance to Codex.
defaultPrompt: Use uv for this Python project.
